brand.name: Stephanie April Photography
brand.tagline: When two imperfect people, are perfect soulmates

offer.what: Wedding photography, engagement sessions, and elopement packages with optional add-ons (bridal, boudoir, proposal, rehearsal, day-after, trash-the-dress, anniversary 'We Still Do' sessions)
offer.coreOutcome: Emotionally authentic, documentary-style visual memories of life's most meaningful moments — so couples can relive the raw feeling of their wedding day forever
offer.pricePoint: Not publicly disclosed; $300 non-refundable retainer to reserve date; custom quotes provided via complimentary consultation; mid-market DFW wedding photography range inferred (~$1,500–$3,500+)
offer.commitment: One-time event booking; 65-mile travel radius from Wylie, TX (75098); $0.025/mile travel fee beyond radius
leadMagnets: Wedding planning budget & timeline templates (referenced in blog)

audience.icp: Engaged couples in the Dallas-Fort Worth area (Wylie, Forney, Kaufman, Terrell, Frisco, Plano) seeking moody, documentary-style wedding photography that captures raw emotion; also serves destination elopement couples nationwide/worldwide
painPoints: Wedding planning overwhelm and decision paralysis
Budget uncertainty — pricing opacity creates friction for cost-conscious couples comparing photographers
Fear of stiff, posed photos that don't reflect their real relationship
Stress around day-of coordination and timeline management
Finding a photographer who truly 'gets' their vision and love story
segments: Traditional wedding couples — full-day DFW coverage, primary revenue segment
Elopement couples — intimate ceremony, destination-friendly, growing segment
Engagement session clients — pre-wedding gateway that often converts to full wedding booking
Boudoir and anniversary clients — existing-couple expansion, repeat business

salesCycle.length: Weeks to months (weddings typically booked 6–18 months in advance; elopements may be shorter)
salesCycle.trial: Complimentary consultation — free discovery call or in-person meeting to discuss vision, pricing, and package options
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Complimentary consultation → custom quote → $300 non-refundable retainer to secure the wedding date
salesCycle.topObjection: Pricing opacity — no rates visible on-site, requiring contact before couples know if it fits their budget; creates high drop-off among comparison shoppers

ahaMoment: Receiving the final edited gallery (typically 6–12 weeks post-event) and seeing their raw, unposed emotions captured exactly as they felt — the moment that validates the entire investment and drives referrals

retention.recurring: Low inherent recurrence (wedding is once-per-couple); repeat business via engagement → wedding pipeline and life-stage add-ons (anniversary, boudoir, future family sessions)
retention.expansion: Add-on session upsells: engagement, bridal, boudoir, couples boudoir, proposal, rehearsal coverage, day-after, trash-the-dress, 'We Still Do' anniversary sessions
retention.churnRisk: Inquiry ghosting if follow-up is slow; loss to cheaper or more price-transparent competitors; long 6–18 month gap between booking and wedding creates contact decay risk

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — no known post-booking nurture to keep booked couples engaged through the 6–18 month pre-wedding wait
Lead-Magnet Nurture — bridal guide downloaders likely receive no automated sequence to convert to consultation bookings
Trial/Consult Conversion — no known automated follow-up after a consultation inquiry or complimentary call
Booking Reminders & Day-Of Prep — no known timeline/reminder series to reduce no-shows and reduce couple anxiety
Renewal & Expansion — no known sequence promoting add-ons or anniversary sessions to past clients
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — no known reactivation flow for cold inquiry leads who never booked
toneVoice: Romantic, poetic, and emotionally warm. Uses intimate endearments ('Beautiful Soulmates,' 'lovebirds'). Conversational and encouraging with genuine empathy for planning stress. Positions photography as deeply personal storytelling — never transactional. Mixes practical planning guidance with heartfelt, intimate sentiment.
compliance: Standard CAN-SPAM / email compliance applies. No HIPAA, financial services, or legal vertical constraints. Photography contracts contain standard liability and retainer language.
